text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Upon hearing that Mejiro Ardan collapsed in the
middle of class, I sprint to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Just embarrassed. It was a history lesson,
you see, and I got a little overzealous...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
But it was just a dizzy spell. I feel right as rain at
the mome—ngh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
...My body appears to be protesting any sort of
physical exertion today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Such a complicated feeling. I'm not sure whether
it's assuring or not that I can tell I'm at my limit...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After letting out a deep sigh, Mejiro Ardan lies
down in bed.
